text.tspan: IMPORTANT: FEDERAL AND STATE LAW REQUIRES DISCLOSURE OF THE VEHICLE MILEAGE UPON TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP. AN INACCURATE OR INCOMPLETE STATEMENT MAY SUBJECT YOU TO CRIMINAL AND/OR CIVIL PENALTIES.
I/We hereby assign, transfer, and warrant title to the vehicle described on the face of this certificate to the following purchaser(s):
ODOMETER DISCLOSURE — I state that the odometer now reads:
[ ] EXCEEDS MECHANICAL LIMITS [ ] ODOMETER DISCREPANCY [ ] EXEMPT
[ ] GIFT TRANSFER — No monetary consideration was exchanged for this vehicle.
STATE OF __________ COUNTY OF __________

On this date, before me, the undersigned notary public, personally appeared the above-named person(s), known to me (or proved on the basis of satisfactory evidence) to be the person(s) whose name(s) is/are subscribed to the within instrument.
[NOTARY SEAL / STAMP]
SELLER MUST DISCLOSE: Has this vehicle been damaged by flood, fire, collision, or other event resulting in damage exceeding 25% of the vehicle's fair market value?
[ ] YES [ ] NO [ ] UNKNOWN
I/We hereby appoint the following individual as my/our attorney-in-fact to execute and deliver all documents necessary to transfer title to the vehicle described herein.

svg.text: FIRST REASSIGNMENT BY A LICENSED DEALER

text.tspan: The undersigned dealer hereby assigns and warrants title of this vehicle to:
ODOMETER DISCLOSURE STATEMENT

svg.text: I state that the odometer now reads (NO TENTHS) miles:

text.tspan: [ ] Mileage is in excess of its mechanical limits.
[ ] Odometer reading is NOT the actual mileage. WARNING — ODOMETER DISCREPANCY.
[ ] EXEMPT — Vehicle is 20 model years or older and not required to have odometer disclosure.
WE, THE BUYER AND SELLER, HEREBY CERTIFY THAT WE HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.

svg.text: SECOND REASSIGNMENT BY A LICENSED DEALER

text.tspan: The undersigned dealer hereby assigns and warrants title of this vehicle to:
ODOMETER DISCLOSURE STATEMENT

svg.text: I state that the odometer now reads (NO TENTHS) miles:

text.tspan: [ ] Mileage is in excess of its mechanical limits.
[ ] Odometer reading is NOT the actual mileage. WARNING — ODOMETER DISCREPANCY.
[ ] EXEMPT — Vehicle is 20 model years or older and not required to have odometer disclosure.
WE, THE BUYER AND SELLER, HEREBY CERTIFY THAT WE HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.
FALSE STATEMENTS ARE PUNISHABLE BY LAW. THIS TITLE IS VOID IF ALTERED OR ERASED.
